title: sambucus racemosa var. tenuifolia
intro: Sambucus racemosa var. tenuifolia, also known as the narrowleaf elderberry, is a deciduous shrub belonging to the Adoxaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Sambucus racemosa var. tenuifolia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate cold and flu symptoms, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
